verbGlossary.COST-LOADED ON: {source} amounts distributed (loaded) onto {target} activities to create a time-phased cost baseline
verbGlossary.MAPPED TO: {source} code structure linked to a corresponding {target} element for cost-schedule traceability
verbGlossary.ALIGNED WITH: {source} hierarchy synchronized between the cost breakdown and {target} breakdown so they share common structure
verbGlossary.BASELINED AGAINST: Project budget frozen in tandem with the approved {target} to form the performance measurement baseline
verbGlossary.PHASED BY: {source}budget distributed across {target}s to establish planned spending gates
verbGlossary.ALLOCATED TO: {source} dollars assigned to specific {target} activities for earned value tracking
verbGlossary.EARNED AT: {source} value credited as earned when the associated {target} is completed
verbGlossary.COMMITTED DURING: Subcontract or purchase order executed during {target}d work period, locking in cost
verbGlossary.PROCURED WITHIN: Purchase order placed within the lead-time window required by {target} logic
verbGlossary.DELIVERED BY: {source}delivery tied to {target} date that gates downstream work
verbGlossary.SPREAD ACROSS: {source} value distributed over the duration of cost-loaded {target} activities
verbGlossary.BILLED OVER: {source} invoiced progressively as {target} duration and progress advance
verbGlossary.ASSESSED VIA: {source} {target} impact evaluated through a time impact analysis
verbGlossary.IMPACTS: {source} causes a shift in {target}, affecting project completion
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source} initiates a tracked {target} change requiring re-sequencing or re-duration
verbGlossary.PRICED AGAINST: {source} cost estimated relative to the affected {target} resources and duration
verbGlossary.REQUESTS: {source}formally requests additional contract time via a time extension
verbGlossary.INCORPORATED IN: Approved commitment change order folded into the next {target} with revised durations or logic
verbGlossary.CAUSED BY: {source} traces its origin to a classified {target} delay
verbGlossary.CHARGED TO: {source} cost posted against the specific {target} where the extra work occurs
verbGlossary.GRANTS: {source}formally approves additional contract time tied to an approved time extension
verbGlossary.EXTENDS: Owner change order pushes a contractual milestone date forward
verbGlossary.REALLOCATED DURING: {source} redistributes dollars between cost codes during {target} cycle
verbGlossary.FUNDED BY: Recovery {target} acceleration work paid for through a budget modification or contingency draw
verbGlossary.RECORDED AT: {source} transaction posted as of {target}'s data date for period-correct reporting
verbGlossary.INCURRED DURING: {source} recognized in the period when the corresponding {target} was in progress
verbGlossary.ACCRUED OVER: {source} accumulated proportionally across {target} duration and percent complete
verbGlossary.BILLED AT: {source}submitted on or keyed to {target} data date for pay-period alignment
verbGlossary.MEASURED THROUGH: {source}verified against {target} percent complete for the work period
verbGlossary.DISBURSED AT: {source} issued as of {target} data date, aligning cash outflow with project progress
verbGlossary.CLEARED AT: {source}confirmed at {target} that gates the next payment
verbGlossary.DECOMPOSED INTO: {source} of values broken down to match individual {target} activities for progress billing
verbGlossary.CONSUMED DURING: Allowance dollars drawn down as {target} is consumed and scope uncertainty is resolved
verbGlossary.RESERVED FOR: {source} dollars held against critical-path risk items that may require additional cost
verbGlossary.FUNDS: {source} budget used to pay for {target} acceleration measures (overtime, added crews, resequencing)
verbGlossary.FORECASTS FROM: {source} (EAC) derived from earned {target} performance data to project final cost
verbGlossary.PROJECTED TO: {source} mapped to calculated {target} dates to determine when remaining spend will occur
verbGlossary.CASH-FLOWED PER: {source}projection generated from the cost-loaded {target} to show period-by-period spend
verbGlossary.PROFILED AGAINST: Cash flow S-curve plotted against {target} dates to compare planned vs actual spend timing
verbGlossary.UPDATED FROM: {source}projection refreshed using the latest look-ahead {target} for near-term accuracy
verbGlossary.MEASURED AT: {source} variance calculated as of {target} data date for period-end reporting
verbGlossary.TRACKED PER: Cost growth percentage recalculated each {target} cycle to show trend over time
verbGlossary.INTEGRATED WITH: CPI combined with earned {target} SPI to form a unified cost-schedule performance view
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AGAINST: {source}cost compared to the original {target} budget to detect over-commitment
verbGlossary.NORMALIZED OVER: {source} rate expressed per unit of {target} duration to enable cross-project comparison
verbGlossary.ACCELERATED BY: {source} burn rate increases when critical-path delays force premium-cost recovery actions
verbGlossary.VALIDATED AGAINST: {source}checked against the as-built {target} actual durations and costs
